auth.label: User Key
auth.description: New Relic user key sent with the Api-Key header for NerdGraph and supported REST API requests. Manage user keys from the official API keys page: https://docs.newrelic.com/docs/apis/intro-apis/new-relic-api-keys/.

actions.name: create_alert_policy
actions.description: Create a New Relic alert policy using the REST alerts API.

incidentPreference.description: The incident preference for the new policy.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_dashboard
actions.description: Create a New Relic dashboard with pages and widgets using NerdGraph.

accountId.description: The account ID that will own the dashboard.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_dashboard_snapshot_url
actions.description: Generate a snapshot URL for a New Relic dashboard page GUID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_deployment_marker
actions.description: Create a New Relic change-tracking deployment marker for an entity GUID using NerdGraph.

user.description: The deployment user or service principal.

commit.description: The deployment commit SHA or revision.

deepLink.description: A URL to the deployment details.

changelog.description: The deployment changelog text or URL.

timestamp.description: The deployment timestamp in Unix milliseconds.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_nrql_condition
actions.description: Create a static or baseline NRQL alert condition for a policy using the REST alerts API.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_secure_credential
actions.description: Create a New Relic synthetic secure credential using NerdGraph.

accountId.description: The account ID that will own the secure credential.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: create_synthetics_simple_monitor
actions.description: Create a New Relic ping monitor by using the syntheticsCreateSimpleMonitor mutation.

accountId.description: The account ID that will own the monitor.

uri.description: The URL or endpoint to monitor.

apdexTarget.description: The ping monitor Apdex target in seconds.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: delete_alert_policy
actions.description: Delete a New Relic alert policy using the REST alerts API.

policyId.description: A string or numeric value returned by New Relic.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

deletedPolicyId.description: A string or numeric value returned by New Relic.

deleted.description: Whether the policy delete request succeeded.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: delete_dashboard
actions.description: Delete a New Relic dashboard by its entity GUID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: delete_nrql_condition
actions.description: Delete a New Relic NRQL alert condition using the REST alerts API.

conditionId.description: A string or numeric value returned by New Relic.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

deletedConditionId.description: A string or numeric value returned by New Relic.

deleted.description: Whether the NRQL condition delete request succeeded.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: delete_secure_credential
actions.description: Delete a New Relic synthetic secure credential using NerdGraph.

accountId.description: The account ID that owns the secure credential.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

deleted.description: Whether the secure credential delete request succeeded.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: delete_synthetics_monitor
actions.description: Delete a synthetic monitor by GUID using the syntheticsDeleteMonitor mutation.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

deletedGuid.description: The GUID of the deleted synthetic monitor.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: execute_nrql_query
actions.description: Execute an NRQL query against a specific New Relic account and return the query results and metadata.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

results.description: A list of loose JSON objects.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_alert_policies
actions.description: List New Relic alert policies with optional name, incident preference, and pagination filters using the REST alerts API.

name.description: The optional partial policy name filter.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

policies.description: A list of loose JSON objects.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Validate the connected New Relic user key and return the current user profile from NerdGraph.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_dashboard_entity
actions.description: Read a New Relic dashboard entity, including its pages and widgets, by GUID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_secure_credential
actions.description: Get a synthetic secure credential by key using NerdGraph entity search metadata only.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: get_synth_monitor
actions.description: Get a synthetic monitor by its legacy monitor ID or entity GUID using NerdGraph entity search.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_deployments
actions.description: List deployment markers for a legacy APM application by using the REST v2 deployments API.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

deployments.description: A list of loose JSON objects.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_monitors
actions.description: List synthetic monitors by using NerdGraph entity search over the SYNTH MONITOR entity type.

cursor.description: The entity search cursor for the next page.

query.description: An optional raw entity search query to further narrow the monitor set.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next monitor page, when available.

monitors.description: A list of loose JSON objects.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_nrql_conditions
actions.description: List NRQL alert conditions for a specific alert policy using the REST alerts API.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

nrqlConditions.description: A list of loose JSON objects.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: list_secure_credentials
actions.description: List synthetic secure credentials by using NerdGraph entity search over the SYNTH SECURE_CRED entity type.

cursor.description: The entity search cursor for the next page.

query.description: An optional raw entity search query to further narrow the credential set.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next credentials page, when available.

credentials.description: A list of loose JSON objects.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: search_entities
actions.description: Search New Relic entities with either the raw entity search language or a structured query builder.

cursor.description: The entity search cursor for the next page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

query.description: The effective search query sent to NerdGraph.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next search page, when available.

entities.description: A list of loose JSON objects.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: update_alert_policy
actions.description: Update a New Relic alert policy name or incident preference using the REST alerts API.

policyId.description: A string or numeric value returned by New Relic.

actions.description: Update a New Relic dashboard by GUID, replacing the dashboard configuration with the supplied pages and widgets.

conditionId.description: A string or numeric value returned by New Relic.

actions.description: Update a New Relic synthetic secure credential value or description using NerdGraph.

accountId.description: The account ID that owns the secure credential.

actions.description: Update a New Relic ping monitor by GUID using the syntheticsUpdateSimpleMonitor mutation.
